comment.body:
"This is a bet that market won’t go below 6350 today and will go upward, just as Trump promised…
The centroid is in the 6360.44 - 6366.16 zone. This is crucial, bcs it separates the 6350 liquidity magnet from the small right-tail that the market is betting on. So today it will test if the call skew is bid or not, sentiment check."
